meaning: n.支撑,支柱,裤吊带adj.令人鼓舞的
examples: The unique column design has diagonal bracing at each end and tabs that bolt into the floors above and below.
They are bracing themselves for a long legal battle.
Businesses globally are bracing for more contraction.
As AES packs it in, other companies in Kazakhstan are bracing for more hits.
When I bade you good-bye for the summer, I was bracing for the storm ahead.
